## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Chief of Staff role at fwd.digital with candidate Nina Iordanova.](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel seeks a CoS to streamline operations, build scalable systems, and manage multiple business functions](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Company values focus on technical excellence, customer happiness, and maintaining a positive culture](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly, considering fundraising to support expansion and hiring ahead of demand](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Nina's background in operations and people management aligns well with the role's needs](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Values

  - [Marcel (Brazilian-American) co-founded fwd.digital with Daniel (also Brazilian)](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Company values include communicating with clarity, relentless excellence, continuous learning, moving fast while staying steady, leading with empathy, and mastering processes](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining a positive culture while being ambitious and achieving goals](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Chief of Staff Role Requirements

  - [Need for someone to:](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Own entire business functions](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Build scalable processes and systems](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [Keep leadership accountable](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Balance immediate execution with long-term scalability](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Role may encompass core CoS duties, client operations, and potentially talent/HR functions](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Current Business Challenges

  - [Rapid growth leading to multiple responsibilities for Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Need for better systems to handle increasing workload and team size](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Cash flow challenges due to hiring ahead of demand and payment terms](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Considering fundraising to support growth and add validation to the business](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### Nina's Experience and Fit

  - [Strong background in operations and people management](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Experience in building systems, standardizing processes, and enhancing company culture](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Previous work on innovative projects like an internal accelerator program](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Skilled in developing hiring processes and performance management systems](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Next Steps in Hiring Process

  - [Marcel to have face-to-face interactions with top candidates for culture fit](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Considering implementing a working session or assignment to assess problem-solving compatibility](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Hiring process moving slower than usual due to rapid business growth and high candidate interest](https://fathom.video/share/eyLjWNzvk4zceYougHUEbVk6QLkW4xvb?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel to follow up via email with any additional questions
  - Keep Nina updated on the hiring process progress
  - Continue evaluating candidates and refining the hiring approach for the CoS role
